headlines.title: Costco won't carry these popular items parents need
headlines.summary: At this stage of the year, parents all over the country are opening their wallets and hitting their local big-box stores to stock up on back-to-school items. And many are straining their budgets to do so.

headlines.title: Is Costco Wholesale (COST) Undervalued As New Product Launches Test Its Premium Valuation?
headlines.summary: Costco Wholesale (COST) has been in focus after several consumer brands, including Laifen, Jackery and Tick Solutions Global, chose the retailer for new product launches and exclusives. This highlights ongoing merchandising activity across its warehouses. See our latest analysis for Costco Wholesale. Costco Wholesale shares closed at US$927.

headlines.title: Why China Could Become Costco's Next Membership Catalyst
headlines.summary: Costco's early Executive Membership success in China, paired with warehouse expansion, could boost fee income, shopping frequency and loyalty.

headlines.title: Will Costco (COST) be Able to Continue High Dividend Growth?
headlines.summary: Bristol Gate Capital Partners, an investment management company, published its Q2 2026 investor letter for the “US Equity Strategy”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Strategy lagged the S&P 500 Total Return Index in the quarter in terms of returns, but outperformed in dividend growth.

headlines.title: Costco has a secret code members need to know
headlines.summary: Costco has a very limited selection compared to other retailers its size. That's an intentional choice that allows the company to keep prices down.

description: Costco Wholesale Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the operation of membership warehouses in the United States, Puerto Rico, Canada, Mexico, Japan, the United Kingdom, Korea, Australia, Taiwan, China, Spain, France, Iceland, New Zealand, and Sweden. It offers merchandise, including sundries, dry groceries, candies, coolers, freezers, deli, liquor, and tobacco; non-food merchandise comprising appliances, small electronics, health and beauty aids, hardware, lawn and garden, sporting goods, tires, toys and seasonal, automotive, stamps, tickets, apparel, furniture, domestics, housewares, special order kiosks, and jewelry; and fresh food, such as meat, produce, service deli, and bakery products. The company is also involved in warehouse ancillary operations, which include gasoline, pharmacies, optical, food courts, hearing-aid centers, and tire installation centers. In addition, it engages in e-commerce, business centers, travel, and other businesses. The company was formerly known as Costco Companies, Inc. and changed its name to Costco Wholesale Corporation in August 1999. Costco Wholesale Corporation was founded in 1976 and is based in Issaquah, Washington.
